goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 1'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

If there is no such hotel, how about one that has a star of 4
Make sure you get phone number and address
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
